question:
In which order do the following topics are introduced in this video ?
(a) Spring pocket DIY.
(b) Easter bucket floral DIY.
(c) Farmhouse bunny in a bucket DIY.
(d) Spring tin bucket floral DIY.
(e) Bunny hop decor.
Which ingredient is not used in the video?
What is the best caption for this video?
options: A. Winter Holiday Decorations: Festive DIY Crafts for Christmas and New Year.
B. Spring Easter Collection #4 DIY Crafts Farmhouse Whimsical Rustic Crafts using Florals and More.
C. Gardening Tips and Tricks: Growing Your Own Organic Vegetables.
D. A Travel Vlog: Exploring Exotic Destinations Around the World.
